---
title: ""
lang: en
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero-banner}
# Florentin LECOMTE {.unlisted}
### Graduate Engineering Student in Applied Mathematics & Modeling {.unlisted}
*Specialized in Modeling for Biology and Medicine*
:::

## About Me

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-8}
Hello! I am a future engineer from Polytech Lyon, also completing a double degree Master 2 "Maths in Action" (specializing in Mathematics, Biology, and Medicine) at Claude Bernard University Lyon 1.

Passionate about the interface between mathematics and life sciences, I am actively seeking PhD funding. My hybrid background (first year of medical school followed by a mathematics curriculum) allows me to understand biological challenges while mastering modeling tools.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
![](photo_logo.jpg){width=67% style="border-radius: 15px; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);"}
:::
:::

## Research Experience

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
### **April -- Sept 2026** | University of St Andrews (Scotland)
**Research Internship:** *Mathematical modeling of cancer invasion and metastatic spread.*
:::

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
### **Sept 2024 -- Jan 2025** | Institut Camille Jordan (Lyon)
**Research Internship:** *Study of Alzheimer's disease through a mathematical model*

- Theoretical analysis using topological degree (existence of equilibria).

- Development of a perinuclear crown recognition algorithm (Python).
:::

## Academic Projects

- **Darwinian Evolution:** Stochastic simulation using the Gillespie algorithm (C++/Python) and analysis of evolutionary branching.
- **Epidemiology:** Modeling rabies propagation using an SEI model (Matlab).
- **High Performance Computing:** Driven cavity simulation via parallel solving (PETSc) of Navier-Stokes equations on GPU A100 (C++).
- **Optimal Control:** Trajectory optimization by implementing Pontryagin's minimum principle for quadratic cost function minimization (Matlab).
- **Climate Modeling:** Modeling thermohaline circulation using ODEs and numerical simulations (Python).
- **Neural Networks:** Development of a convolutional neural network for image recognition (Python).

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-7}
## Education

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
### M2 Maths in Action (Master's Degree)
Epidemiology, Evolutionary Biology, Spatial Ecology Modeling, Geometric Approach for Images and Shapes.
:::

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
### M2 Maths in Action & 5th Year Polytech
High Performance Computing, Discontinuous Galerkin, Optimal Control, Regression Models, Process Statistics, Risk Analysis, Research Project (analysis and reproduction of simulations from a scientific article).
:::

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
### 4th Year Polytech
Internship at Institut Camille Jordan, Finite Element Method, Hyperbolic Problems, Time Series, Bayesian Models, Numerical Analysis, Unsteady Problems, Academic Project.
:::

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
### 3rd Year Polytech
Continuous Optimization, Inferential Statistics, Neural Networks, Operations Research, Software Engineering, Data Analysis, Databases, Mathematical Methods for Engineers, Entrepreneurship Project.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-5}
## Skills

**Languages & Tools** <span class="skill-tag">Python</span>
<span class="skill-tag">C/C++</span>
<span class="skill-tag">Matlab</span>
<span class="skill-tag">R</span>
<span class="skill-tag">LaTeX</span>

**Languages** <span class="skill-tag">English (Toeic: 890)</span>
<span class="skill-tag">Spanish (Beginner)</span>
:::

:::

## Publications

P. Amster, F. Lecomte, F. Olivares, L. Pujo-Menjouet. Exploring a Non-Autonomous Model Through Topological
Degree: A Radiobiology Application. (In preparation)

J. Restier-Verlet, M. L. Ferlazzo, A. Granzotto, J. Al-Choboq, M. Estavoyer, F. Lecomte, M. Bourguignon, L. Pujo-Menjouet and N. Foray.
[**"Accelerated Aging Effects Observed In Vitro after an Exposure to Gamma-Rays Delivered at Very Low and Continuous Dose-Rate Equivalent to 1-5 Weeks in International Space Station"**](https://www.mdpi.com/2073-4409/13/20/1703).
*Cells* 2024, 13, 1703.

---

## CV & Contact

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
**<i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email:** [lecomteflorentin@gmail.com](mailto:lecomteflorentin@gmail.com) <br>
**<i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Location:** Saint Andrews, Scotland
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 style="text-align: right;"}
<a href="CV_en.pdf" class="btn btn-primary" target="_blank">
  <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Download my CV (PDF)
</a>
:::
:::
